title: Hotkeys
search: Fuzzy search keys, actions, or groups
widget_tooltip: Left click opens cheatsheet · middle click cycles sets · right click refreshes
import_desc: Known sets (Niri, Noctalia, Kitty) are live by default. Add custom files as Path, Name|Path, or Name|format|Path. Formats: auto, toml, json, kdl, kitty.

settings.refresh_seconds_description: How often to re-read enabled config files.
settings.python_binary_description: Command used to run the bundled parser.
